title: BYD sales plunge in first two months of 2026 as EV giant loses more ground to competitors
summary_full: BYD lost ground to its domestic competitors over the first two months of 2026, as overall demand in China's electric vehicle market slowed.
summary_public: BYD lost ground to its domestic competitors over the first two months of 2026, as overall demand in China's electric vehicle market slowed.
